title: Tender Middle Eastern Chicken Umm Ali
description: A garlicky and tender Middle Eastern dish featuring peach juice, perfect for a sick day, made in a traditional earthenware bowl and simmered to perfection.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in an earthenware bowl over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the chicken to the bowl and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper to the bowl and stir to combine.
Pour in the peach juice and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve the chicken hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
